title: Dendroviguiera quinqueradiata
taxonomy: Dendroviguiera quinqueradiata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This family, also known as the staff tree family, comprises approximately 900 species of deciduous and evergreen shrubs and trees. Dendroviguiera quinqueradiata, in particular, is native to the island of Borneo and is part of the genus Dendroviguiera, which includes several species of trees. The plant's classification is further defined by its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiosperms), and class (Magnoliopsida). Overall, the classification of Dendroviguiera quinqueradiata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
